case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. KENNETH FREDRICK STEADMAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEADMAN, KENNETH FREDRICK $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00, $5000, CALCULATED AS $2500 IN FEES FOR THE USE OF A LOANER CAR AND $2500 IN STORAGE FEES FOR MR.
